special_mechanics.name: Jet Flight Acceleration/Deceleration
special_mechanics.description: Player controls jet with ability to accelerate forward and slow down (decelerate) using joystick

special_mechanics.name: Lateral Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player can move left and right on screen using joystick

special_mechanics.name: Fuel System
special_mechanics.description: Player must manage fuel gauge; fuel can be collected by flying over fuel depots; fewer fuel tanks appear as river progresses

tier_notes: Tier 2: No precise physics parameters documented in source. Wikipedia gameplay description only mentions qualitative control mechanics (accelerate/decelerate easily) and lateral movement. No gravity, jump physics, or sub-pixel data available. Game is a shmup without traditional jumping/gravity systems.
